DATASET_LOAD_COMPLETED.message: Dataset: {dataset_name} load completed successfully | job id: {job_id}

QUERY_COMPLETED.message: Query execution completed successfully | job id: {job_id}

DATASET_WRITE_COMPLETED.message: Dataset write completed successfully to {destination} | dataset: {dataset_name} | rows: {row_count} | job id: {job_id}

DATASET_WRITE_FAILED.message: Dataset write failed to {destination} | dataset: {dataset_name} | job id: {job_id} | reason: {reason}
